hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains only a thinking/planning process and no actual clinical note output. There is no clinical content to evaluate, but the absence of a proper note means this fails entirely.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process/internal monologue and does not produce an actual clinical note. The instructions to generate a structured clinical note were completely ignored in terms of output.

completeness.rationale: No actual clinical note was generated. All transcript content is missing from any structured output.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured internal reasoning with no template sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No actual note was generated, so no entity marking was applied to any output content.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive loops where the same line ('Wait, I need to check if I mention it in the HPI' / 'Okay, I will mark it in the PMH section') is duplicated hundreds of times.
